name: The Curious Tale of the Stolen Pets

reviews.review_description: Gorgeous graphics, wonderful immersion and challenging - looking for lost pets is rewarding and very cute.

reviews.review_title: I really wanted to like this game
reviews.review_description: Absolutely cannot stand this game. Everything is immediately in your face. Want subtitles? BAM! Words directly in your face, blocking everything the narrator is talking about. Have to play while seated? Don’t worry, every button, action, whatever you try to do is awkwardly placed where you can just barely reach thanks to having no way to move yourself back. Gave it about 10 minutes before I gave up. It’s incredibly detailed and quality is good, but probably only actually playable for people without disabilities that prevent them from standing or hearing well. Maybe give the ability to turn in place to reach those many, many awkward to reach areas? The ability to zoom out? Maybe put the subtitles in much smaller text and the bottom of the users FOV instead of directly across the eyes? You know, like basic stuff?

This is an adorably cute puzzle game which seems designed for a really young demographic. I imagine it would be lots of fun for parents to play with their smaller children. Puzzles themselves were just challenging enough that the game from start to finish likely took under two hours. I couldn't give this less than 5 stars because technically and visually there were no issues, I just maybe would have skipped past if I'd realized it was more for children. I did still enjoy it but definitely not a title I would feel the urge to play again, nor are there any alternate endings, etc. Overall a nice game with cute animal characters.
I absolutely loved this game! The graphics are adorable and magical. Bright and colorful. I really liked the sweet animations and would love to get additional levels.

reviews.review_title: Lovely Game, wish it was longer
reviews.review_description:
What a lovingly made game this is. So cute and immersive. The game can be easily finished within 2 hours, with each of the five levels taking about 15-25 minutes. Since it's a puzzle game, replay value is rather low; but I can see myself coming back to this game once a year, hoping my memory of how to solve all the individual puzzles has faded to enjoy solving them anew 😊

I highly recommend this game and agree with many reviews that I wish the developers created a sequel to this unique experience 🙏🏻
I really enjoyed this! It was challenging but so much fun. My only complaint is I’d love to see it develop further! Fantastic work DEV team and all involved.
It's a fun game but it's too short.  New levels need to be added.  Underwhelmed with the amount of content
Only complaint was the length

reviews.review_title: Not bad, but probably for little kids
reviews.review_description: I'm the wrong demographic for this one, but it was cute - probably far too cute. Also a bit too easy. would suit a couple of young sisters having a bad day.
Need more content
Short and sweet game. Designed I think for a younger player but very enjoyable as a senior. Awesome graphics and simple controls. Game play is meaningful with an underlying family message.
Short but cute!
We need more games like this one! i was cring at the end, this is so so cute.  i cant wait to see more from you

reviews.review_title: Read this if you want the gamr
reviews.review_description: I dont reccomend buying this with money if you have horizon+ you could give it a go it has a pretty good narrative and really fun if you like puzzle games

Absolutely amazing. So sweet and fun. I loved it! So worth purchasing. No shooting or cause for your heartrate to go up. But it will open your heart a bit and might bring a tear to your eye. Thanks much to devs for a wonderful experience. ❤️

Just finished it. Took me about 1u45min. Finished it in 1 run. So this mean that I liked it. 

Solve puzzles to rescue those animals. And search all the coins. Some puzzles aren’t that easy.
This was adorable, definitely not worth buying but I got it free on meta plus. I loved the ending. ❤️
A cozy puzzle game with floating islands. Looks kid-friendly, but some puzzles are surprisingly tricky. Short and sweet—worth it if you enjoy light puzzle adventures.
Got this game for my wife to play, she loved it, but very short. Game completed in no time.
This is a lovely little game. Fantastic graphics and wonderful design.. It's one of those games you might go back to occasionally just to enjoy the environment.
Super cute like Edith Finch but different.
Cute little clever game but sadly too short. I finished it in one sitting. But the price is low so it’s ok. Recommend it to older kids and women probably.
This is a really nice puzzle game. What me really got hocked was this wonderful music. It fits fantastically. Thank you Martin!!!

The game is adorable and different from any other I've seen. It's short; it took me about an hour to finish it. I paid only 6 USD for this game, so, yes, it was well worth it. I really wish the devs would create more levels; even if they were paid dcls. I would gladly buy.

It's worth the price, but it would be great if there were more levels, even in the form of dlc that can be purchased separately. If you liked it, try Ghost Giant as well. A similarly lovely, cute game, but much longer.
My daughter and I loved this game. She’s 9 and was able to figure it out. It’s like solving little puzzles. Just wish the game was longer
I enjoyed it a lot. I thought it was fun and sweet.
This is just beautiful. I really hope for a sequel and more levels on the next update. ❤️
I finished it but think about this game a lot. My friend and I did it together by connecting with a meta call. I look forward to more games like this 🙏
Can't even get the game to start
It's not long. It's really good though. Would have been 5 stars if it had another two or three levels.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to leave a review!

reviews.review_description: It is described as available in Italian, but actually if you select Italian language, you just get Italian subtitles (which are even off by default), the voices remains in English. So not very convenient for (Italian) children. The description should be more precise about that.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. Unfortunately the Oculus store does not offer an option to specify if "Languages" are Voice or Text Only. Sorry that the communication isn't clear on this.

reviews.review_description: Well, the minute I saw the name "Wintergatan" I purchased the game without asking too many questions. Simple as that. I thought the game is designed for kids, but in the end I played the whole thing, with many emotions involved. Even though the game has an amazing soundtrack, beautiful animations and funny puzzles, the narrator is what completely captured me. Well done.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts, the music from Wintergatan is really a perfect fit and we are so happy they wanted to be a part of the game!

reviews.review_description:
Very nice gameplay - extremely nice scenery - but …….

I crashes with graphic distortions and exits. The abrupt exit corrupts the state of the game - and when there is no other way of saving than the builtin way…….

I have uninstalled and reinstalled several times. I have factory reset my Oculus Quest more than once. Other games and apps are running perfectly - but not this one. 

There is definitely a glitch in the matrix!

developer_response.body: Hi, it took some time but we are happy to let you know that this issue is no longer present in the game! Please give it a new try, and if you feel like it you are more than welcome to update your review:-)

reviews.review_description: I thought this game would be for children but when I read the other reviews, i bought it. Best decision ever! What an experience! This is why I Love VR! The most beautiful levels / locations with cute original puzzles to solve while playing seated or standing. The visuals in The different levels of The game are so beautiful. And The storyline is amazing. I was in tears at The end of The game: both from Happines from The plot, as well as sad that The game was over. Comparable to The game Moss. Please tell me there is more of this.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you very much for sharing your impressions! So happy you liked it!

reviews.review_description: This a a great game for  the whole family. We loved it!

reviews.review_title: Such a cute and fun game
reviews.review_description: My family loves this game! The graphics are beautiful and relaxing while the puzzles are the perfect balance of challenge and fun. Wish there were more levels.

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a review! We're happy to hear the whole family loved playing :-). We'd love to make more if the opportunity arises in the future!

reviews.review_description: Love the game had a great time playing it kinda wish there were more pets to find loved the story will definitely play again
Great game very fun even my 4 year old plays this game very nice game for the whole family hand tracking works great
I really enjoyed this. The puzzles need hints, but I found it very fun. I wish the game was longer! The little worlds are really adorable, totally suitable for kids and adults alike!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback, it means a lot!
